PreInvocation.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" && if command -v timeout >/dev/null 2>&1; then _gcbd_skew=$(timeout 10 bd doctor 2>&1); elif command -v gtimeout >/dev/null 2>&1; then _gcbd_skew=$(gtimeout 10 bd doctor 2>&1); else _gcbd_skew=$(bd doctor 2>&1); fi; case "$_gcbd_skew" in *"schema version mismatch"*|*"Unable to open database"*) printf '%s\n' "$_gcbd_skew" >&2 ;; esac; GC_PROVIDER_SESSION_ID_REQUIRED=antigravity GC_PROVIDER_SESSION_ID="${ANTIGRAVITY_CONVERSATION_ID:-}" GC_MANAGED_SESSION_HOOK=1 GC_HOOK_EVENT_NAME=SessionStart gc prime --hook --hook-format antigravity
export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" && gc hook run --timeout 15s --timeout-exit-code 0 -- nudge drain --inject --hook-format antigravity
export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" && gc hook run --timeout 15s --timeout-exit-code 0 -- mail check --inject --hook-format antigravity
